text:
Once upon a time in a small town called Harmony Ridge, there was a wise old owl named Olly. Olly lived high in the ancient oak forest at the edge of town. He had seen many things in his time, witnessed history, born kings, and dreamed of far-off places.

One peculiar thing Olly discovered was the ability to understand human speech. He couldn’t talk, but he could listen and know what everyone was saying. People loved Olly. They'd come from miles away just to hear his tales.

One sunny afternoon, Olly sat on an ancient boulder overlooking a peaceful stream. A young girl named Lily came down the hill. She was timid but had an adventuresome look in her eyes.

"The forest whispers secrets," Olly remarked one day. "Would you like to hear one?"

She nodded eagerly, sitting beside him. "I’ve heard scary stories. What could you possibly know?”
